text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
It really is tough, isn't it? And that feeling when
you think you're about to get it and then it falls!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: But still! I had lots of fun!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I might not be walking away with a plushie, but I'll
always have the memories!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: So don't beat yourself up about it. Okay, Trainer?
